summary: NVDA delayed research data for 2026-05-12: 6 signal modules evaluated; session return +1.07%.

findings.label: Momentum Confluence
evidence: Momentum is evaluated as confluence against recent price and volume.
limitations: MACD and StochRSI are confluence inputs only, not standalone edge claims.
Recent technical-rule evidence is mixed after costs.

findings.label: Opening Range Breakout
evidence: Requires stocks-in-play, stop, target, and slippage assumptions.
limitations: ORB must be filtered by RVOL and compared with buy-and-hold.

findings.label: Daily High/Low and Fib Map
limitations: Fib levels are references, not proof of support or resistance.

findings.label: FVG / Imbalance Zones
evidence: Zones are tracked for fill status and invalidation in the UI model.
limitations: ICT/FVG is treated as a testable imbalance zone, not doctrine.

findings.label: Buy-and-Hold Baseline
evidence: All tactical reads are compared against this baseline.
limitations: Baseline ignores taxes, borrowing costs, and overnight risk.
Costs and slippage can dominate intraday edges.

findings.label: Profitable-Company Dip Proxy
limitations: This is a dip-versus-strength comparison only.
Gamma-neutral market-maker behavior is proxied from options data.

disclaimer: Educational research output only. Not financial advice.
